sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89505" key="proskatadesme/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατα-δεσμέω</orth>, <sense id="n89505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tie up besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
